subcodes.first_line: Praise and glory, remembrance and splendor be unto the most holy and exalted court of that Beloved One Who hath [3.5s]... ...The law of the Fast is ordained for those who are sound and healthy
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا و ذکر و بها مخصوص ساحت اقدس امنع حضرت محبوبیست که عالم و امم را از
subcodes.subjects: @law of fasting, @power of prayer, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
